home.title: Check for AI
home.noScansBody: Your first scan will show up here.

upload.dragOrClick: Drag an image or click to upload
upload.hint: JPG, PNG, HEIC — up to 10 MB
upload.tapToChange: Tap to choose a different image

result.noIndicators: No specific indicators highlighted for this image.
result.analysisUnavailable: Detailed analysis unavailable for this image.
result.disagreementHeadline: Our detectors disagreed on this image
result.disagreementBody: Treat this verdict with extra caution. Individual detector signals below tell the full story.
result.heatmapCaption: Red areas show where the detector found AI patterns.
result.previewUnavailableSub: The scan is still available — we just couldn't load the thumbnail.
result.heatmapSkippedHeadline: Heatmap not available for this image
result.heatmapSkippedBody: TruthScan doesn't generate one when the verdict is clear. The verdict is still accurate.
result.heatmapUnavailableBody: The verdict is still accurate. The visual breakdown couldn't be generated for this image.

sub.human: This image appears to be human-made.
sub.ai: This image was likely made by AI.

verdict.unavailableBody: The scan couldn't produce a verdict. Try again with a different image.

history.title: History
history.previousHere: Your previous scans will appear here.
history.trashExplainer: Deleted scans land here for 30 days before being purged.

toast.undoFailed: Couldn't undo. The scan stays in trash.

quota.title: Daily scan limit reached
quota.usedAll: You've used all {{limit}} scans for today.

FILE_TOO_LARGE.headline: File too large
FILE_TOO_LARGE.body: Maximum size is 10 MB. Try a smaller file or convert to JPG.

FILE_TOO_SMALL.headline: File too small
FILE_TOO_SMALL.body: This image is too small to analyze.

FILENAME_INVALID.headline: Filename not accepted
FILENAME_INVALID.body: Rename the file and try again.

UPLOAD_FAILED.headline: Upload couldn't finish
UPLOAD_FAILED.body: Your connection may have dropped. Your image wasn't saved.

UPLOAD_EXPIRED.headline: Your upload expired
UPLOAD_EXPIRED.body: We couldn't confirm the upload in time. Please try again.

SUBMIT_FAILED.headline: We couldn't start the scan
SUBMIT_FAILED.body: The detection service didn't respond. Your image wasn't scanned.

SCAN_FAILED.headline: Scan couldn't finish
SCAN_FAILED.body: Something went wrong with the analysis.

SCAN_TIMEOUT.headline: Scan couldn't finish
SCAN_TIMEOUT.body: The scan took longer than expected.

QUOTA_EXCEEDED.headline: Daily scan limit reached
QUOTA_EXCEEDED.body: You've used all your scans for today.

SCAN_NOT_FOUND.headline: Scan not found
SCAN_NOT_FOUND.body: This scan doesn't exist or has been permanently deleted.

HEATMAP_UNAVAILABLE.headline: Heatmap unavailable
HEATMAP_UNAVAILABLE.body: The verdict is still accurate. The visual breakdown couldn't be generated for this image.

ANALYSIS_UNAVAILABLE.headline: Detailed analysis unavailable
ANALYSIS_UNAVAILABLE.body: Detailed analysis unavailable for this image.

PREVIEW_UNAVAILABLE.headline: Preview unavailable
PREVIEW_UNAVAILABLE.body: The scan is still available — just without a preview thumbnail.

UPSTREAM_DOWN.headline: Scanning is temporarily unavailable
UPSTREAM_DOWN.body: The detection service is temporarily unavailable. You can still view your history.

RATE_LIMITED.headline: Slow down for a moment
RATE_LIMITED.body: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.

INVALID_REQUEST.headline: Something went wrong
INVALID_REQUEST.body: Please refresh the page and try again.

INTERNAL_ERROR.headline: Something went wrong
INTERNAL_ERROR.body: Please refresh and try again. If this keeps happening, try again later.
